title: RoomCode
description: Lobby room code. 8-character Crockford-Base32 string per `docs/architecture/lobby-identifiers.md`. Mirrors the `RoomId` definition inside `signaling-message.schema.json` so the wire shape and the local-state shape stay in lockstep; this file is the single source of truth for non-signaling code paths (UI labels, deep links, save fixtures).
